summary: Tested new features for Iteration 39: ProductCard premium design, StoresListPage with Leaflet map, and multi-language email registration. All features working correctly. Fixed a bug in stores search API where None values caused AttributeError.

minor.issue: FIXED - Search filter was calling .lower() on None values causing AttributeError

issues: When filtering by country (ES), shows 'No stores in this region' because existing stores don't have country field set - this is expected behavior, not a bug

passed_tests: ProductCard: Renders with product name, price, and image
ProductCard: Shows trust signals (rating, review count, units sold)
ProductCard: Displays certification badges (vegan, gluten-free, etc.)
ProductCard: Shows low stock badge ('Only 3 left')
ProductCard: Shows out of stock badge ('Sold Out')
ProductCard: Has Add to Cart and Buy Now buttons
StoresListPage: Region filter enables after country selection
StoresListPage: Leaflet map renders with tiles and markers
StoresListPage: Store cards display in sidebar during map view
Registration API: Accepts language parameter (en, es, ko)
Registration API: Sends verification email in correct language
Registration API: Falls back to English for unsupported languages
Regions Config API: Returns ES, US, KR regions correctly
critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.js: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
StoresListPage.js: Leaflet integration works correctly with dynamic markers
server.py: Multi-language email templates properly configured for es, en, ko
server.py: Registration endpoint correctly uses language parameter for email templates
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed stores search filter to handle None values
seed_data_creation: Created test users with different language preferences (en, ko, es) for email verification testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 verified: 1) ProductCard premium design working with ratings, certifications, stock badges, and action buttons. 2) StoresListPage with Leaflet map integration working - map view toggle, country/region filters, and search all functional. 3) Multi-language email registration working - emails sent in correct language (en/es/ko) based on user preference. 4) Fixed bug in stores search API where None values caused AttributeError.

product_card_design.details: Premium design with serif fonts, ratings (8.7, 7.5, etc.), review counts, units sold, certification pills (vegan, gluten-free), stock badges (Only 3 left, Sold Out), and action buttons

stores_list_page.details: Country filter, region filter, search input, map view toggle all functional. Leaflet map renders with tiles and markers.

stores_map_view.details: Leaflet map loads with 20 tiles and 2 markers. Store cards display in sidebar. Toggle between grid and map view works.

multi_language_email.details: Registration emails sent in correct language: English ('Verify your account'), Korean ('계정 인증'), Spanish ('Verifica tu cuenta')

registration_language_param.details: API accepts language parameter and uses it for email template selection. Falls back to English for unsupported languages.
